2606.31186.title: Gated Multi-Graph Fusion via Graph Attention Networks for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
2606.31186.paper_summary: Spontaneous speech is a vital non-invasive biomarker for Alzheimer's Disease (AD), yet many systems overlook non-linear structural disruptions and clinical heterogeneity in pathological language. We propose a Multi-View Gated Graph Attention Network that transcribes audio via Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) to construct semantic, dependency, and co-occurrence graphs, characterizing speech through a "content-structure-flow" framework. Notably, the co-occurrence graph leverages Pointwise Mutual Information (PMI) from a normative corpus to quantify narrative logic and linguistic deviation. To address symptomatic diversity, an adaptive gated fusion mechanism dynamically integrates these views. Evaluated on the ADReSSo dataset, our model achieves 90.00% accuracy. Ablation results confirm that the PMI-based graph and heterogeneity-aware gating are essential for robust classification across diverse clinical populations. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/opeacc/AD.
2606.31186.paper_summary_zh: 自發性言語是阿茲海默症（AD）的一個重要非侵入性生物標記，但許多系統忽視了病理語言中的非線性結構破壞和臨床異質性。我們提出了一種多視角門控圖注意力網絡，通過自動語音識別（ASR）轉錄音頻，以構建語義、依賴和共現圖，通過“內容-結構-流”框架來表徵言語。值得注意的是，共現圖利用來自規範語料庫的點對點互信息（PMI）來量化敘事邏輯和語言偏差。為了解決症狀多樣性，適應性門控融合機制動態整合這些視角。在ADReSSo數據集上的評估中，我們的模型達到了90.00%的準確率。消融結果確認基於PMI的圖和考慮異質性的門控對於在不同臨床人群中進行穩健分類至關重要。我們的源代碼已公開於 https://github.com/opeacc/AD。
2606.31186.author: Jinyu Li et.al.
2606.31186.authors: Jinyu Li, Xiao Wei, Bin Wen, Kai Li, Yuqin Lin, Xiaobao Wang, Longbiao Wang, Jianwu Dang
